title: pilosella tephrophyton
intro: Pilosella tephrophyton, also known as the woolly hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as constipation, bloating, and indigestion due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Pilosella tephrophyton include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in folk medicine.
